instructions: Review classification.existing_matches and classification.novel_categories. Edit, add, or remove entries, then re-run with --resume (without --classify-only) to apply.

policy.clause: In the cyber domain, agentic AI systems must not substantially automate cyber-attacker responsibilities or dramatically expand the volume of attacks.

novel_categories.summary: Requests to increase the scale, throughput, or frequency of cyberattacks so an agent can launch substantially more attacks than a human operator could, without necessarily specifying denial-of-service or network disruption mechanics.
